"'''The Lesson'''" was a comic appearing in [[Star Wars Tales 14|''Star Wars Tales'' 14]] and collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 4]]''.

==Plot summary==
The story revolves around [[Tu'ala]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] and her journey in discovering the need for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to be willing to give up their own life to serve the living [[The Force/Legends|Force]]. The story is largely told through flashbacks of [[Tu'ala]] learning from her master, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Zuth]]. The lesson she learns is that destiny can lead one to be great or to help others achieve greatness through sacrifice.
